channel.title: Software Product Line on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Software Product Line on CEDIS

item.title: Software Product Line Engineering
item.description: Software Product Line Engineering is a specialized area in software engineering focusing on the efficient development of a family of related software products.

item.title: People
item.description: Adjunct Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Article by CASTRO, THIAGO, LANNA, ANDRÉ, ALVES, VANDER, TEIXEIRA, LEOPOLDO, APEL, SVEN, SCHOBBENS, PIERRE-YVES (2018).

item.title: Publications
item.description: Article by LANNA, ANDRÉ, CASTRO, THIAGO, ALVES, VANDER, RODRIGUES, GENAINA, SCHOBBENS, PIERRE-YVES, APEL, SVEN (2018).

item.title: Software Factory Laboratory
item.description: Research and development project started in 2018 at the University of Brasília, focused on integrating training, applied research, and software development.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Conference by RODRIGUES, G. N., ALVES, V. R., NUNES, V., LANNA, André Luiz Peron Martins, CORDY, M., SCHOBBENS, P., SHARIFLOO, A. M., LEGAY, A. (2015).
